channel.title: Gasthof Spessartruh Steiger
channel.description: Recent content on Gasthof Spessartruh Steiger

item.title: Suite
item.description: Facilities: Comfortable box spring beds Living area with dining table & espresso machine Kitchen with oven and stove Bathroom with rain shower 55-inch Smart TV Sofa bed Large balcony with dining table and morning sun Wi-Fi

item.title: Comfort Double Room
item.description: Facilities: Comfortable box spring beds Modern TV Some with balcony Bathroom with shower, toilet, and hairdryer Wi-Fi

item.title: Jobs
item.description: We are looking for support for our team! In part-time/full-time or on a 520€ basis Cook Kitchen assistant Waitstaff Cleaning staff Are you interested? Then we look forward to receiving your application in writing, via email, or by phone!

item.title: Steiger and Surroundings
item.description: The small village of Steiger, with around 80 inhabitants, is located on a hilltop without through traffic. The fresh air of the Spessart forest and the quiet, relaxing location make it perfect for extensive hikes, cycling, and motorcycle tours. Sightseeing spots and shops are easily accessible by car. Are you planning a stopover on your way to your vacation? The proximity to the A3 motorway and our large parking lot make it a great choice.
